parts.description:
A toggle group that does NOT create its own composite root, for use inside a container that
already owns keyboard focus (e.g. a toolbar). The `[rdxToggle]` children register with the nearest
ancestor composite root instead. Mirrors Base UI's behavior of skipping its composite root
when nested in a toolbar.

inputs.name: defaultValue
inputs.description: The values pressed when the group is initially rendered (uncontrolled).

inputs.name: disabled
inputs.description: Whether the whole group is disabled.

inputs.name: form
inputs.description: Associates the group with an external form by id.

inputs.name: multiple
inputs.description: Whether multiple items can be pressed at the same time.

inputs.name: name
inputs.description: Native form field name. Pressed values are submitted as repeated entries under this name.

inputs.name: orientation
inputs.description: The orientation of the group, controlling arrow-key navigation.

inputs.name: value
inputs.description:
The pressed values. Always an array — a single value is `[value]`. Use with `(onValueChange)`
for controlled state.

inputs.name: dirty
inputs.description: Whether the value changed from its initial value. Merged with internal tracking.

inputs.name: errors
inputs.description: Validation errors for the control. A non-empty list marks it invalid.

inputs.name: invalid
inputs.description: Whether the control is invalid. A non-empty {@link errors} list also marks it invalid.

inputs.name: pending
inputs.description: Whether async validation is pending. Pending controls publish neither `data-valid` nor `data-invalid`.

inputs.name: touched
inputs.description: Whether the control has been touched. A `model()` so Signal Forms can write it; set on blur/focus-out.

outputs.name: onValueChange
outputs.description: Event emitted when the pressed values change.

outputs.name: touch
outputs.description: Emits when the control is touched, notifying Signal Forms (stable Angular 22 contract).

parts.description:
A set of two-state buttons that can be toggled on or off. Owns composite keyboard focus over its
`[rdxToggle]` children.

See https://base-ui.com/react/components/toggle-group

inputs.name: dir
inputs.description: Text direction for arrow-key navigation.

inputs.name: loopFocus
inputs.description: Whether keyboard navigation should loop from the last item back to the first.

inputs.name: defaultValue
inputs.description: The values pressed when the group is initially rendered (uncontrolled).

inputs.name: disabled
inputs.description: Whether the whole group is disabled.

inputs.description: Associates the group with an external form by id.

inputs.name: dirty
inputs.description: Whether the value changed from its initial value. Merged with internal tracking.

inputs.description: Validation errors for the control. A non-empty list marks it invalid.

inputs.description: Whether the control is invalid. A non-empty {@link errors} list also marks it invalid.

outputs.description: Event emitted when the pressed values change.

outputs.name: touch
